sourceStatement: A案で作業を進めてください
approvedActions: prepare an official data request to the Onga River Office
identify an official contact route and submit only after the recipient and message are verified
download and archive publicly available official hydrology metadata and observations
preserve provenance, quality flags, time basis, and vertical datum metadata
notApproved: assigning any station directly to M, N, O, or G
using astronomical tide as observed M-boundary water level
inventing bathymetry, Manning roughness, discharge, rating curves, fishway flow, or barrage coefficients
changing the approved 679791-pixel water geometry or the 50333-cell mesh
enabling the physical solver or replacing the legacy public flow calculation
